post.content:
Recently gave interview for uber sde-2 position. It had 5 rounds.
1. Screeing round: Had 2 questions: one on valid BST, another Lc medium on Trees
Was able to solve both of them, and got two more rounds scheduled.
2. DS/Algo round: Was asked an LC hard on graphs currency exchnage problem. Was able to solve it in the last few minutes of the interview and passed all the testcases.
3. LLD round: Design parking system. Was able to explain and code the entire thing, and the interviewer seemed happy.
Got HIRE in both these rounds and the last 2 rounds were scheduled.
4. HLD round: Design Webhook. Wasn't able to design it in the best manner, but was able to talk and suggest optimisations and communicated well with the interviewer.
Got a Soft hire in this round.
5. Behavioural round: Wasn't prepared for this interview, i thought my experience would be sufficient to talk through but that wasn't the case and i got mixed review. 
Hr scheduled another behavioural round and told me they don't do it for everyone.
I prepared well this time, and was able to answer most of the questions, really don't know where i lacked but didn't get a positive response this time as well. Hr told me i lacked design experience.
 My only advice would be to be prepared for every situation and every round matters. 

If anyone can refer me to their organisation for SDE 2 position in banaglore/hyderabad, it would be a great help. Thanks.

Hey about the LLD round the expectation was to code the entire the system in the given time ? How did you present your different pieces of  solution ? (uml diagrams/doc/just code ) . Any design pattern used ?\n

"Behavioural round: Wasn\'t prepared for this interview, i thought my experience would be sufficient to talk through but that wasn\'t the case"\nMy uber interview is coming in few days, can you please tell me What else was asked in your behavioural round other than your experience
Hey, i got positive in all rounds except design, can i expect offer from them, debrief is scheduled tommorow
LLD round was done on which platform bro please tell.\n\n
I had my HLD round yesterday, and it kinda sucked. Have my BR on Friday, did you feel not doing so well in HLD results in immediate rejection?
LLD round was done on which platform bro please tell.
After your lld round, how many days hr took to schedule other 2 rounds?
May I know how many interviews have you given, I am also applying for sde 2. I wanted to know, if there is language specific requirement in DSA round.
how can we prepare for Behavioural round, any resources? Pls share!
My org is hiring SDE 2 , you can reach out to me at temp90949@gmail.com
Was the screening round a Code Signal test?
We are looking for SDE 2 in our org. Hit me up
How did you prepare for LLD and HLD ?
